subject: fix delete policy test in new policy healthcheck
commit_message:
fix delete policy test in new policy healthcheck

errors are seeing with latest oom install after this
new healthcheck has been added.   Delete policy operation
section seems incorrect.

Issue-ID: POLICY-2817
Signed-off-by: jhh <jorge.hernandez-herrero@att.com>
Change-Id: I63e1c053a5b361909cb393a29b38c1ee917c3629

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Not sure why the verify job is not getting triggered (jenkins server seems pretty idle)

Patch Set 1:

last policy tests look fine: https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/daily/onap_daily_pod4_master/09-11-2020_07-09/xtesting-healthcheck/full/full/report.html
was it not fixed in another patch by Nagendra

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
> 
> (1 comment)

It was fixed yesterday itself and ran fine in today's gating.
Thanks.

Patch Set 1:

I don't think the problem was fixed yesterday with Nagendra's second review, although somehow the problems is masked in the report in error.

One problem is that URL is wrong, it is using a non-existing service:port URL that does not exist (pdp:8081).   There is no such service.

Note that there is no assertion test reported in the output.

Check out the section of the "Run Delete Policy Request" section of the policy section to see these issues:

https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/daily/onap_daily_pod4_master/09-11-2020_07-09/xtesting-healthcheck/full/full/log.html#s1-t23

Nagendra, please patch this review if it is necessary, so there is no multiple reviews out, and we all know what is going on.   If there is something wrong with this one, apply the patch on top of it.   There is no need for POLICY_ENDPOINT, the delete URL should be the same as the API one to retrieve the policy, so pretty much should be a duplicate of it, similar to what you have done with the PAP section.

There is no need for POLICY_ENDPOINT, the delete URL should be the same as the API one to retrieve the policy, so pretty much should be a duplicate of it, similar to what you have done with the PAP section.
